title: timotocia rosularis
side_effects: Timotocia rosularis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling, particularly if ingested or applied to sensitive skin areas. Overexposure to its potent extracts has also been linked to nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals. In rare cases, prolonged use or excessive dosage of timotocia rosularis may cause liver damage or interact negatively with certain medications, such as blood thinners. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the timotocia rosularis plant for any health purposes.
